name: Salesforce Agentforce Contact Center
description: Unified AI agent platform for contact center operations. Integrates voice, digital channels, CRM data, and AI agents into a single system. Enables AI agents and human operators to work together for scalable customer self-service and support.
notes: Extends Agentforce ecosystem from sales to customer service. Multi-channel (voice + digital) support with agent-to-human escalation.
